Label: N/A
Issue: No mention of how to handle data corruption during transmission
Correction: The system shall implement error-checking mechanisms to detect and correct data corruption during transmission.

Label: Section 3.1
Issue: Does not specify the maximum allowable downtime for the system
Correction: The system shall have a maximum allowable downtime of 1 hour per month.

Label: APAF-FR-07
Issue: Does not specify the frequency of updates for web-based displays
Correction: The web-based displays shall be updated every 5 minutes with the most current data.

Label: APAF-FR-09
Issue: Does not specify the types of errors to be handled
Correction: The system shall handle errors including but not limited to data corruption, transmission failures, and processing errors.

Label: APAF-PR-01
Issue: Does not specify the method of password protection
Correction: The system web server shall use two-factor authentication for password protection.

Label: APAF-CR-02
Issue: Does not specify the storage capacity required for the archival system
Correction: The archival system shall have a minimum storage capacity of 10 TB.

Label: APAF-DR-01a
Issue: Does not specify what happens if transmission and processing are not error-free
Correction: If transmission and processing are not error-free, the data shall be reprocessed and retransmitted within the next 24 hours.

Label: APAF-DR-02c
Issue: Does not specify the format for data submission to NASA PDS
Correction: The data shall be submitted to NASA PDS in a PDS4-compliant format.

Label: APAF-DS-II-4
Issue: Does not specify the type of operator input required
Correction: The operator input shall include commands for data processing, error handling, and system maintenance.

Label: APAF-DS-OI-2
Issue: Does not specify the retention period for system logs
Correction: System logs shall be retained for a minimum of 5 years.
